ul.li: MASQUERADE: Alias for dynamic SNAT on the primary IP of the egress interface (eth0).
Tuple Persistence: conntrack uses a 5-tuple hash (Proto, Sip, Sport, Dip, Dport) to identify return traffic.
Namespace Boundary: The transition from bridge to container involves a veth pair crossing memory boundaries.
Performance: Netfilter rules processed via do_table() in kernel context.
